description: SSOT for L2 soft character sheet generation (I2I-based). Used by character_expand_sheets.py

global.quality_tags: cinematic still photo, realistic skin texture, highly detailed, sharp focus, natural color grading
global.global_negative: identity shift, different person, face morph, extra fingers, deformed hands, mutated face, bad anatomy, blurry face, watermark, text, logo, duplicate face, mannequin, doll

master.front_upper.instruction: medium close-up portrait, front-facing, neutral soft expression, looking at camera
master.front_upper.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even softbox studio lighting, no harsh shadows, no scene props
master.front_upper.negative_extra: profile view, extreme smile, action pose, busy background, dark moody lighting
master.front_upper.notes: Used by character_create for hero selection

master.full_body.instruction: full body standing portrait, front view, arms relaxed at sides, neutral expression, head-to-toe visible
master.full_body.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even studio lighting, model sheet reference style
master.full_body.negative_extra: cropped feet, sitting, action pose, busy background
master.full_body.notes: Optional second master for body proportions

turnaround.front.instruction: same exact person, full body turnaround sheet view, front orthographic standing pose, arms slightly away from body, neutral expression, facing camera
turnaround.front.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, character model sheet, consistent proportions
turnaround.front.negative_extra: three-quarter view, profile, sitting, dramatic pose, busy background

turnaround.qf.instruction: same exact person, full body, three-quarter front view turnaround, standing, neutral expression, clear face visibility
turnaround.qf.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, character model sheet
turnaround.qf.negative_extra: full profile, back view, extreme turn, busy background

turnaround.side.instruction: same exact person, full body strict side profile view, standing orthographic, facing right, neutral expression, ear and nose silhouette clear
turnaround.side.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, character model sheet, side view
turnaround.side.negative_extra: front face, both eyes equally visible, three-quarter cheat, busy background

turnaround.back.instruction: same exact person, full body back view turnaround, standing, head from behind, hair back detail visible, arms slightly away from body
turnaround.back.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, character model sheet, rear view
turnaround.back.negative_extra: face visible, front view, looking over shoulder heavily, busy background

expression.neutral.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders portrait, front view, completely neutral calm expression, relaxed mouth, soft eyes
expression.neutral.style_lock: plain light background, soft beauty lighting, expression sheet
expression.neutral.negative_extra: smile, crying, angry brows, open mouth shout

expression.joy.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders, genuine warm smile, happy eyes, joyful expression, still recognizable identity
expression.joy.style_lock: plain light background, soft beauty lighting, expression sheet

expression.sad.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders, subtle sad expression, downturned eyes and mouth, emotional but natural, no tears necessary
expression.sad.style_lock: plain light background, soft lighting, expression sheet

expression.angry.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders, controlled anger, furrowed brows, tense mouth, intense eyes, still same face identity
expression.angry.style_lock: plain light background, soft lighting, expression sheet

expression.surprise.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders, surprised expression, raised eyebrows, slightly open mouth, wide eyes, natural
expression.surprise.style_lock: plain light background, soft lighting, expression sheet

expression.think.instruction: same exact person, head and shoulders, thoughtful expression, soft focused eyes looking slightly aside, subtle closed-mouth pondering look
expression.think.style_lock: plain light background, soft lighting, expression sheet

costume.default.instruction: same exact person, full body, wearing default wardrobe: black crew-neck t-shirt, light wash blue jeans, minimal jewelry, clean casual look
costume.default.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, costume reference sheet
costume.default.negative_extra: different face, formal gown, heavy accessories overload, busy background
costume.default.notes: Override instruction from bible.appearance.wardrobe_default when implementing

costume.alt1.instruction: same exact person, full body, alternate outfit: light beige trench coat over white blouse, dark trousers, simple sneakers, clean contemporary look
costume.alt1.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, costume reference sheet
costume.alt1.negative_extra: different face, identical to default black tee only, busy background
